_comment: BASELINE RESUME - Source: Viresh-Duvvuri-Resume-AI-Engineer.pdf | This is the proven format to replicate for all applications | Copy this file and customize for each job
_CRITICAL_WORKFLOW: ALWAYS use this baseline as source of truth. NEVER use template bullets. Template has placeholders - this has real bullets.

basics.name: Viresh Duvvuri
basics.summary: AI Software Engineer with 5+ years building production systems. Currently developing AI agents and automation tools using LangChain, MCP, and Python that improve operational efficiency by 50-80%. Recent work includes multi-agent systems for analytics and RAG-based diagnostic tools in production. Experience spans developing applications for drones and embedded systems, full-stack development, and distributed AI platforms.

highlights: Architected and deployed production voice-based conversational AI agent serving as intelligent front desk automation, handling multi-turn dialogues for appointment scheduling, customer inquiries, and business workflow automation using MCP framework and advanced prompt engineering techniques

Implemented comprehensive AI safety and monitoring infrastructure using OpenTelemetry to track conversation quality, detect hallucinations, and maintain response accuracy above 90% with real-time alerting and escalation protocols for production voice systems

Built robust conversational AI pipelines with intent classification, entity extraction, and context management for business-specific scenarios, integrating with external APIs and knowledge bases to provide contextually appropriate responses across voice interactions

Designed and deployed guardrails and fallback mechanisms to prevent AI hallucinations and ensure reliable handoff protocols when confidence thresholds are not met, maintaining high user satisfaction and system reliability for customer-facing voice applications

Developed AI-enabled data processing system using LangChain, Python, and SQL databases from concept to deployment, reducing analyst research workflows by 70% within 2 months through intelligent query generation
Built scalable backend service with API architecture handling 50-100 daily queries, ensuring reliable performance for real-time smart grid data analysis and operational decision support
Implemented automated report generation pipeline accelerating stakeholder deliverables by 60% within first quarter, eliminating manual documentation processes for utility operations

work._CRITICAL: ONLY BULLET 1 IS CUSTOMIZABLE - BULLETS 2-4 ARE LOCKED
work._rule: Bullet 1 emphasizes AI tool (varies by role), bullets 2-4 show progression and match LinkedIn exactly
work._updated: 2025-11-10 - Reordered bullets 2-4 for better AI narrative flow: AI/Data work (1-2) then Software/Leadership (3-4)

_variations.ai_engineer: Independently designed and built AI-powered diagnostic tool using Python and modern LLM frameworks (Ollama, Llama 3.2) from requirements to production, deployed to production
_variations.ai_engineer_finetuning: Independently designed and built AI-powered diagnostic tool using Python, fine-tuned Llama 3.2-3B on domain-specific drone telemetry using LoRA achieving 18% accuracy improvement, evaluated RAG quality with deepeval, serving production users daily
_variations.ai_engineer_azure: Independently designed and built AI-powered diagnostic tool using Python and LLM frameworks (Ollama, Llama 3.2), deployed on Azure infrastructure serving production users, integrated with cloud services for scalable inference and monitoring
_variations.ai_engineer_knowledge_graph: Built AI-powered diagnostic tool for drone log analysis using Python and LLM frameworks (Ollama, Llama 3.2), processing flight data to identify system failures, deployed to production
_variations.ai_engineer_a2a_orchestrator: Architected A2A multi-agent diagnostic system with central orchestrator coordinating specialized expert agents (codebase expert, customer ticket expert, Jira expert) using Python and LLM frameworks, deployed to production with intelligent context gathering and coordination
_variations.software_product_engineer: Developed comprehensive diagnostic and analysis tools for engineering teams, independently designed and built AI-powered diagnostic tool using Python and modern LLM frameworks from requirements to production, improving customer self-service capabilities and team response times by 40%

projects.name: GridCOP: Smart Grid Analytics Agent
highlights: Problem: Power grid analysts needed automated database querying and intelligent insights to understand complex data patterns beyond basic visualizations

Solution: Developed multi-agent system using LangChain orchestration and MCP where specialized agents coordinate tasks, implemented RAG with vector search (FAISS), monitored agent decision quality using LangSmith tracing and deepeval for retrieval assessment achieving 0.85+ context precision, built data pipeline to collect and annotate 500+ user queries for continuous model refinement, deployed on AWS with observability

Impact: Enhanced analyst productivity by 70% through AI co-pilot that augments domain experts with automated workflows, implemented human-in-the-loop (HIL) evaluation and testing pipelines for production-ready AI systems with robust error handling through rapid iteration

projects.name: AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
highlights: Problem: Manual system analysis taking hours of expert time, creating bottlenecks in product development and customer support resolution

Solution: Built full-stack application with React frontend, Python Flask backend, integrated foundation model APIs (Ollama and Llama 3.2) for real-time log processing and interactive analysis using prompt engineering and model evaluation
Impact: Transformed expert analysis from hours to minutes, deployed to production with significant performance improvements through rapid iteration and continuous optimization

projects.name: AI Travel Planner Agent
highlights: Problem: Manual travel planning requiring hours of research across multiple sources with inconsistent and outdated information
Solution: Built AI agent using Claude 3.5 Sonnet, LangChain, Streamlit, and DuckDuckGo Search API for personalized itinerary generation using prompt engineering techniques
Impact: Demonstrated end-to-end AI application development, learned conversational AI patterns and real-time data integration techniques through iterative development
